description: Versioned parser and resource limits for every OpenAPI source surface (DCW-0.2, #2419). Consumed by the designer safe-parse wrapper now and mirrored field-for-field by the DCW-2.1 backend parser (#2352) and the DCW-2.2 editable source workspace (#2356).

onViolation.statement: A document violating any limit is rejected with structured diagnostics; no partial parse result is returned and no stored version or draft is mutated.

maxDocumentBytes.statement: UTF-8 byte-length ceiling checked before parsing; 10 MiB covers the large commercial tier (~5 MB) with 2x headroom.

maxAliasCount.statement: Passed to the yaml library's toJS maxAliasCount option. The library bounds count * aliasCount per anchor (an expansion-cost product, not a literal count of alias occurrences); this is the documented anti-billion-laughs bound.

maxNestingDepth.statement: Maximum collection nesting depth. The yaml library has no built-in depth option, so the safe-parse wrapper enforces this with a conservative pre-parse scan plus an exact iterative post-parse check.

maxYamlDocumentsPerSource.statement: Multi-document YAML streams are rejected; an OpenAPI source is exactly one document.

duplicateKeyPolicy.statement: Duplicate mapping keys are rejected with line/column diagnostics (yaml uniqueKeys). JSON.parse silently keeps the last duplicate; JSON duplicate detection is a documented gap owned by the DCW-2.1 backend parser (#2352).
